name: Black Pepper Cream Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium-high heat, melt the butter/bacon fat.
2. Whisk in the flour. Cook the flour until it is lightly browned.
3. Remove the pan from the heat.
4. Pour the milk into the pan in a steady stream, whisking constantly.
5. Return the pan to the heat.
6. Whisk until the gravy thickens.
7. Whisk in the cream, salt, and pepper.
8. Keep warm until needed.
